home.whyManufacturingDesc: Self-owned brand and factory control over motors, drivers, gearboxes, and matched motion kits.
home.whyDispatchDesc: Stocked catalog items ship fast from multiple regional warehouses with export-ready packaging.
home.whyEngineeringDesc: Application engineers help with sizing, spec confirmation, and post-order follow-up.
home.whyPricingDesc: Published volume breaks plus contract lanes for annual programs and OEM demand.
home.heroTitle: Engineering-grade motion. Ready to ship worldwide.
home.heroDescription: Stepper, BLDC, and servo motors with drivers, gearboxes, and matched kits — backed by CAD, datasheets, tiered pricing, and engineering support from a single self-owned brand.
home.shopByCategoryDesc: Jump straight into the motion category you are sourcing.
home.selectorStripDesc: Use our 5-step Selector to match torque, frame, voltage, and feedback to your application.
home.solutionsDesc: Application-led motion stacks mapped to selector, catalog, and RFQ handoff.
home.featuredDesc: Direct-buy best sellers ready for checkout, tier pricing, and fast dispatch.
home.whyDesc: A single source for engineered motion, fast fulfillment, and commercial flexibility.
home.latestApplicationsDesc: Recent motion programs across packaging, robotics, and medical builds.
home.resourcesHubDesc: Latest engineering articles, sizing guidance, and commissioning notes.

search.metaDescription: Search products, support content, technical FAQ answers, glossary terms, applications, blog posts, and documents from one page.
search.description: Product matches use the same grid and row layouts as category browse. Content, FAQ, and document hits stay grouped below the product shelf.
search.searchPlaceholder: Product name, SPU, or spec phrase
search.productMatchesDesc: {count} products for “{query}”. Toolbar and filters stay encoded in the URL for sharing.
search.productMatchesDescAll: {count} products for all catalog. Toolbar and filters stay encoded in the URL for sharing.
search.paginationHint: Page through product matches while keeping the active search phrase and filters.
search.noProductsDesc: Try a shorter phrase, clear stock-only, or browse a product family from the sidebar.
search.resourcesDesc: Support pages, downloads, applications, blog posts, and glossary entries.
search.faqDesc: Operational and engineering answers with deep links to the source entry.
search.docsDesc: Attachment hits from matched product detail pages.
search.noTypeResultsDesc: Switch result type, broaden the phrase, or browse a category family.
search.noMatchesDesc: Try broader terminology, switch to a family browse, or start from the selector path.
search.factoryDirectFallback: Factory-direct motion product with configurable specification support.

catalog.heroFallbackDesc: Engineering-grade product family with direct-buy and RFQ support.
catalog.matchingProducts: {count} matching products. Filters and toolbar state stay encoded in the URL for team sharing.
catalog.rowFallbackDesc: Factory-direct motion product with configurable specification support.
catalog.paginationHint: Switch page sizes or continue paging while preserving the active filter set.
catalog.emptyDesc: Try widening the keyword, clearing stock-only, or switching back to all purchase modes.
catalog.aboutFallback: This category groups engineering-grade components suitable for repeatable production workflows, CAD-backed validation, and mixed direct-buy or RFQ procurement.
catalog.faqNarrowQuestion: How do I narrow {category} by stock and purchase mode?
catalog.faqNarrowAnswer: Use the toolbar and left-side chips to combine in-stock-only with direct-buy or inquiry models, then share the resulting URL with your team.
catalog.faqCompareQuestion: Can I compare {category} SPUs before ordering?
catalog.faqCompareAnswer: Yes. Add up to four SPUs to the compare drawer and open the compare page when you are ready for side-by-side review.

comparePage.metaDescription: Evaluate catalog items side by side before direct buy or RFQ.
comparePage.title: Review products side by side before checkout or RFQ.
comparePage.description: Compare up to four SPUs with live catalog specifications. Your shortlist stays in this browser, and signed-in buyers can sync it across devices.
comparePage.emptyTitle: No products in the compare list yet.
comparePage.emptyDesc: Browse the catalog and use Add to Compare on any product page or listing card.
comparePage.intro: Comparing {count} of 4 products. Specifications are loaded from the catalog.
comparePage.needMore: Add at least one more product to load the live specification matrix.
comparePage.matrixError: Specification comparison could not be loaded. Try again in a moment.

accountPortal.signInTitle: Sign in to access your member center
accountPortal.signInDesc: Orders, addresses, wishlist items, and inquiry history are tied to an authenticated account.

loginPage.metaDescription: Access account orders, checkout, and inquiry records.
loginPage.title: Sign in to STEPMOTECH
loginPage.description: Use your work account to continue checkout, track RFQs, and manage saved BOM-ready sourcing activity.
loginPage.formDesc: After sign-in, you will return to the requested protected page or the member center with a safe internal redirect.
loginPage.whySignInTitle: One account for orders, quotes, and company details
loginPage.whySignInDesc: Your STEPMOTECH member account keeps purchasing activity, quote follow-up, and company information in one place so your team can buy faster and stay organized.
loginPage.highlight1: View orders, quotes, invoices, and saved addresses from your member center.
loginPage.highlight2: Resume checkout and account tasks without re-entering your details.
loginPage.highlight3: Track quote requests and inquiry history in one place.
loginPage.highlight4: Company accounts are ready to use right after registration.
loginPage.highlight5: Update company profile, shipping addresses, and preferences anytime.
loginPage.passwordUpdated: Password updated. Sign in with your new credentials.
loginPage.accountCreated: Business account created. Sign in to continue.

faqPage.metaDescription: Frequently asked questions about products, ordering, technical specifications, and industrial motion control sourcing.

faqPage.glossaryDesc: Motion control terminology referenced across the catalog and support content.
faqPage.ctaTitle: Our engineering team is ready to help.
faqPage.ctaDesc: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact us directly for personalized support.

quotePage.metaDescription: Submit RFQ lines with quantity, target market, and engineering notes.
quotePage.lineItemsDesc: Review quantities before submitting. Click a product image to preview.
quotePage.contactDesc: We will use these details for quote follow-up and commercial coordination.
quotePage.projectDesc: Help us understand scope, timing, and expected volume.
quotePage.attachmentsDesc: Drawings, BOMs, or spec sheets help us quote faster. Up to 8 files.

quotePage.needContact: Complete all required contact fields (except VAT / Tax ID) before submitting.
quotePage.submitFailed: Unable to submit RFQ right now. Please try again.

quotePage.uploadHint: PDF, Office, or images · multiple files supported
